summary: CP6 validator passed: approval grants are issued correctly, health gating blocks write steps, empty approval is rejected, plan edits invalidate grants, and review UI shows dependency warnings.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Approve creates grant
checks.actual: grant-d88e7c6853 created with 2 approved steps on plan_version=1

checks.name: CHECK-02: Health gate blocks write actions
checks.actual: HTTP 400 with detail 'Account not HEALTHY — write actions blocked'

checks.name: CHECK-03: Empty step_ids -> 400
checks.expected: HTTP 400 Chon it nhat mot buoc
checks.actual: HTTP 400 with detail 'Chon it nhat mot buoc'

checks.name: CHECK-04: Edit plan -> grant invalidated
checks.command: Approve step-1, then PATCH /api/plans/plan-90d1d8a2 {"instruction":"bo step cuoi"}, then query approval_grants
checks.actual: grant-1120bf0453 marked invalidated=1 after refinement to version 2

checks.name: CHECK-05: Grant in DB
checks.command: sqlite3 backend/app.db "SELECT grant_id, plan_version, approver_id, approved_at FROM approval_grants ..."
checks.actual: Latest grants persisted with plan_version=1, approver_id=local_user, approved_at populated

checks.name: CHECK-06: ApprovePage UI
checks.actual: ApprovePage contains checklist review copy, approve action, and health-aware review flow

checks.name: CHECK-07: Dependency warning
checks.actual: ApprovePage computes dependencyWarning when a selected step depends on an unselected step
